svg.text: AI-Powered Carton Labels, Warning Labels & Compliance — Generic Architecture v2.0
Maps any PO format → standard schema
Brand, fonts, panel layout, handling symbols,
compliance rules DB, warning label templates,
Match PO items ↔ PI line items by SKU
Classify product material & type via AI
Queue critical gaps for human input
Calculates panel widths from box L×W
Inserts product drawing on short sides
Logistics text: PO#, carton#, wt, cube
Adaptive AI reads ANY PO/Protocol/Warning format — no hardcoded parsers
Once an importer profile is configured, all their orders use the same template
Rules engine auto-determines which warning labels apply per SKU from product attributes
No pre-built library — Vision AI creates fresh SVG outlines from product photos
AI generates, human validates — compliance manifest reviewed before delivery
Die-cuts + warning stickers as SVGs with real mm units for CorelDraw
Export Labeling Automation System — Architecture v2.0 — Includes Compliance Engine, Barcodes & Warning Labels
